ocr_text: 103rd Territorial Brigade (Unit designation); The Sun (Media watermark); СПІЛЬНОТА СТЕРНЕНКА (Sternenko Community); The Kamikaze drones successfully destroy enemy armored and cargo vehicles and electronic warfare equipment by crashing into them at speed. assessment_reasoning: The image clearly depicts a tank, a military vehicle, within a Ukrainian context.
